name: Race Change Collar
description:
A collar that makes use of the wonders of nanorobotics, in order to turn people into who they're REALLY supposed to be! (Hint; it's a slutty woman of another race!)

Contains transformation and hypnosis or mind control content. WARNING: Transforms people into stereotypes of different races. Identity loss/ ego death a possibility. Caveat emptor.
creator: Calamnestra
